text: Obsidian is a local-first, offline-capable note-taking application that serves as a second brain on disk.

evidence.quote: Obsidian is your second brain on disk.

text: The AI acts as the librarian that reads, organizes, and queries the Obsidian vault for the user.

evidence.quote: AI is the librarian that reads, organizes, and queries it for you.

text: Standard AI chats lose knowledge after the conversation ends, requiring users to re-explain context on every query.

evidence.quote: Most AI chats are like talking to someone with amnesia. You explain something, they answer, the conversation ends, the knowledge disappears.

issues.detail: quote spans a window `p011.s002`..`p012.s002` around the ref

text: In this setup, knowledge is compiled once and kept current rather than re-derived on every query.

evidence.quote: Knowledge gets compiled once and kept current.. not re-derived on every query.

text: The vault is the structured wiki of markdown files that gets built from source materials.

evidence.quote: The wiki is what gets built.

text: That hot.md file in your vault root is a rolling 500-character cache of your most recent context.. the topic you're focused on, the last thing you ingested, the question you just asked.

evidence.quote: That hot.md file in your vault root is a rolling 500-character cache of your most recent context.. the topic you're focused on, the last thing you ingested, the question you just asked.

issues.detail: quote spans a window `p060.s001`..`p061.s002` around the ref

text: index.md is the live catalog of all wiki pages in the vault.

evidence.quote: index.md — Live catalog of all wiki pages

text: log.md is an append-only chronological action log of all vault operations.

evidence.quote: log.md — Append-only record of all actions

text: Use wiki-links (double brackets) for every cross-reference between pages.

evidence.quote: Use [[wiki-links]] for every cross-reference.

text: Every wiki page must end with a ## Sources section linking back to raw/ files.

evidence.quote: Every page ends with a ## Sources section linking back to raw/

text: Never manually edit files inside wiki/ — drop new information into raw/ or update CLAUDE.md instead.

evidence.quote: Never manually edit files inside wiki/. That's the AI's layer.

text: One page should contain one claim; atomic notes enable 2-3x better cross-referencing than essays.

evidence.quote: One page = one claim. Atomic notes beat essays. Cross-referencing works 2-3x better when each page is tightly focused.

text: Initialize git in the vault folder and commit daily for free version history and instant rollback.

evidence.quote: Run git init in the folder. Commit daily. Free version history and instant rollback when the AI does something weird.

text: Set a weekly Sunday calendar reminder for the lint workflow to prevent wiki decay.

evidence.quote: Skipping the weekly lint. Without it, your wiki silently rots. Set a Sunday calendar reminder.

text: The Ingest workflow processes a source file by extracting entities and concepts, creating or updating wiki pages, and logging the action.

evidence.quote: The AI reads the source, extracts entities and concepts, creates new wiki pages, updates existing ones, and logs the action.

text: The Query workflow checks hot.md and index.md, follows backlinks, and synthesizes answers with citations from relevant pages.

evidence.quote: The AI checks hot.md for recent context, reads index.md for relevant pages, follows backlinks, and synthesizes an answer with citations.

text: The Lint workflow performs a weekly health check by scanning for contradictions, orphan pages, stale claims, and missing pages.

evidence.quote: The AI scans for contradictions between pages, orphan pages with no links, stale claims, and concepts mentioned in passing but lacking their own page.

issues.detail: 1 argument(s) not found in the quote/span — advisory only

text: The Hot Cache workflow updates hot.md with recent context after every meaningful session, cutting token usage on day-to-day queries by 80-90%.

evidence.quote: For routine queries, the AI checks hot.md first instead of crawling the full wiki. Cuts token usage on day-to-day queries by 80-90%.
